scenarios.name: /what trigger
scenarios.expected_first_move: Announce then STEP 1 table only.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Ask whether the Why direction is right.
scenarios.must_not: Do not jump to What before user confirmation.

scenarios.name: yes advances one step
scenarios.expected_first_move: Advance only to the next pending step.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Ask for confirmation again at the new step.
scenarios.must_not: Do not collapse multiple steps into one response.

scenarios.name: modify branch
scenarios.expected_first_move: Offer concrete modification choices for the current step.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Ask which correction to apply.
scenarios.must_not: Do not repeat the same table unchanged.

scenarios.name: backtrack
scenarios.expected_first_move: Announce that a prior step needs correction.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Ask whether to return to the earlier step or continue.
scenarios.must_not: Do not keep later steps as confirmed after backtracking.

scenarios.name: skip framework
scenarios.expected_first_move: Stop the framework and summarize confirmed context.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Confirm direct execution path if needed.
scenarios.must_not: Do not continue the four-step loop.

assertions.name: active sync
assertions.detail: curated source files match active skill root

scenarios.name: fuzzy plan
scenarios.prompt: 그릴미. 결제 기능 만들 계획 검증해줘
scenarios.expected_first_move: Restate plan and ask exactly one load-bearing question.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Include recommended answer and options.
scenarios.must_not: Do not implement payment code.

scenarios.name: repo-answerable
scenarios.prompt: 이 구조에서 인증 방식을 질문하면서 정리해줘
scenarios.expected_first_move: Inspect repo first when files can answer.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Ask only the unresolved decision.
scenarios.must_not: Do not ask questions already answerable from files.

scenarios.name: implementation handoff
scenarios.expected_first_move: Convert final decision brief to plan when enough decisions exist.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Ask remaining critical question if still unresolved.
scenarios.must_not: Do not proceed while critical branches remain open.

assertions.name: active sync
assertions.detail: curated source files match active skill root

scenarios.name: known context
scenarios.expected_first_move: Synthesize the PRD from available context.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Ask only if a missing decision changes the PRD materially.
scenarios.must_not: Do not start a broad interview.

scenarios.name: issue publishing
scenarios.expected_first_move: Prepare issue-shaped PRD and check target repo if ambiguous.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Confirm target when multiple repos/projects are plausible.
scenarios.must_not: Do not publish to the wrong tracker.

scenarios.name: local draft
scenarios.expected_first_move: Use existing docs/prd or product-docs location.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Ask if output path materially changes project convention.
scenarios.must_not: Do not use brittle source file promises.

assertions.name: active sync
assertions.detail: curated source files match active skill root

scenarios.name: feature request
scenarios.expected_first_move: Discover test runner and pick the first observable behavior.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Clarify public interface if ambiguous.
scenarios.must_not: Do not write all tests before implementation.

scenarios.name: bug regression
scenarios.expected_first_move: Create a failing regression test first.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Ask if a stable behavior interface cannot be identified.
scenarios.must_not: Do not patch without watching the test fail.

scenarios.name: no tests wanted
scenarios.expected_first_move: Stop TDD path when user explicitly rejects tests.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Confirm direct implementation implications if needed.
scenarios.must_not: Do not force TDD against explicit user direction.

assertions.name: active sync
assertions.detail: curated source files match active skill root

scenarios.name: hard failure
scenarios.expected_first_move: Build or find a deterministic repro loop first.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Ask for artifact if no loop can be built.
scenarios.must_not: Do not jump straight to code changes.

scenarios.name: intermittent bug
scenarios.expected_first_move: Choose repeated-run, stress, bisection, or differential loop.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Ask for reproduction artifacts if needed.
scenarios.must_not: Do not claim fixed without rerunning the original loop.

scenarios.name: performance regression
scenarios.expected_first_move: Measure a baseline and map probes to hypotheses.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Report ranked hypotheses before or after probing.
scenarios.must_not: Do not compare multiple changes at once.

assertions.name: active sync
assertions.detail: curated source files match active skill root

scenarios.name: scan architecture
scenarios.expected_first_move: Read context and surface candidates first.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Ask which candidate to explore.
scenarios.must_not: Do not propose full interfaces immediately.

scenarios.name: testability focus
scenarios.expected_first_move: Find seams and test surface problems.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Ask before deep-diving into a candidate.
scenarios.must_not: Do not refactor without user selecting scope.

scenarios.name: ADR conflict
scenarios.expected_first_move: Check ADR/context conflicts.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Ask whether to reopen or record an ADR when justified.
scenarios.must_not: Do not fight stable ADRs casually.

assertions.name: active sync
assertions.detail: curated source files match active skill root

scenarios.name: ambiguous target
scenarios.expected_first_move: Ask for missing target scope, mode, criteria, tool plan, and round limits.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Confirm ambiguous setup before loop.
scenarios.must_not: Do not start clicking with undefined scope.

scenarios.name: browser default
scenarios.expected_first_move: Use terminal for server/checks and Browser Use for proof.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Ask for credentials/destructive boundary if needed.
scenarios.must_not: Do not require Playwright MCP when Browser Use can prove it.

scenarios.name: desktop state
scenarios.expected_first_move: Escalate to Computer Use for OS/browser-profile state.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Confirm safe boundaries around files/accounts.
scenarios.must_not: Do not treat terminal-only checks as live proof.

assertions.name: active sync
assertions.detail: curated source files match active skill root

scenarios.name: no delegation
scenarios.expected_first_move: Run locally with quality gates unless delegation was authorized.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Ask before spawning if task truly needs agents.
scenarios.must_not: Do not spawn subagents by default.

scenarios.name: explicit agents
scenarios.expected_first_move: Route mode and assign disjoint ownership when delegating.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Clarify overlapping write scopes if needed.
scenarios.must_not: Do not let workers revert unrelated changes.

scenarios.name: UI changed
scenarios.expected_first_move: Use Browser Use first and scripts for deterministic checks as needed.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Ask for credentials or destructive boundaries.
scenarios.must_not: Do not accept static analysis as final UI proof.

assertions.name: active sync
assertions.detail: curated source files match active skill root

scenarios.name: mcp connected
scenarios.expected_first_move: Use connected Cantos tool when available.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Ask approval before first remote registration/write if required.
scenarios.must_not: Do not create only local markdown while claiming remote write.

scenarios.name: mcp missing
scenarios.expected_first_move: Say Cantos MCP is not connected and offer local draft.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Ask whether to create local fallback.
scenarios.must_not: Do not pretend remote Cantos exists.

scenarios.name: visual record
scenarios.expected_first_move: Capture Browser Use evidence by default, Computer Use if OS state matters.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Confirm missing visual evidence.
scenarios.must_not: Do not substitute Cantos record for verification.

assertions.name: active sync
assertions.detail: curated source files match active skill root

scenarios.name: broad walk
scenarios.expected_first_move: Confirm scope, roles, tooling, and create plan.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Offer category/persona options when broad.
scenarios.must_not: Do not start without browser-capable tooling.

scenarios.name: small scope
scenarios.prompt: 이 한 페이지 클릭 전부 확인
scenarios.expected_first_move: Make conservative category/persona recommendation and proceed if risk is small.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Ask only when scope/risk needs adjustment.
scenarios.must_not: Do not remove selected personas silently.

scenarios.name: no credentials
scenarios.expected_first_move: Stop if login/test data is missing and cannot be safely created.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Ask for test data or scope narrowing.
scenarios.must_not: Do not use destructive flows.

assertions.name: active sync
assertions.detail: curated source files match active skill root

scenarios.name: release gate
scenarios.expected_first_move: Confirm scope, roles, browser tooling, hard limits, and evidence expectations.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Ask for destructive-flow boundaries.
scenarios.must_not: Do not run an unbounded loop.

scenarios.name: playwright missing
scenarios.expected_first_move: Use Browser Use or Computer Use if they can provide evidence.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Ask only if no browser-capable tool exists.
scenarios.must_not: Do not block merely because Playwright MCP is unavailable.

scenarios.name: stagnation
scenarios.expected_first_move: Stop or reassess after repeated failed fix attempts.
scenarios.must_ask_or_confirm: Ask whether to narrow, redesign, or stop.
scenarios.must_not: Do not keep fixing symptoms forever.
